---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a feature or design change
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Does this touch the architecture?**
Some decisions are deliberate (auth via GoTrue, RLS always on, SQL-first schema,
shared-heavy / per-project-light). If your proposal interacts with these, please
say how — see `docs/` and `docs/roadmap.md`.
